infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FaceAttend uses the camera to capture face images for attendance registration and recognition.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FaceAttend may use the microphone for video processing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FaceAttend needs access to your photo library to upload profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FaceAttend uses your location to verify attendance is being marked at the correct venue.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: FaceAttend uses Face ID for secure authentication.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FaceAttend to access your camera for face recognition attendance.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FaceAttend to use your location to verify attendance venue.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FaceAttend to access your photos for profile picture upload.
